# Variable: CACHE\_MODULE\_OPTIONS

```ts
const CACHE_MODULE_OPTIONS: string | symbol = MODULE_OPTIONS_TOKEN;
```

Defined in: [packages/cache/src/cache.constants.ts:39](https://github.com/nestelia/nestelia/blob/main/packages/cache/src/cache.constants.ts#L39)

Re-export of MODULE_OPTIONS_TOKEN for convenience.

This token provides access to the raw cache module options
used during module initialization.
